description_long: This object is a modern kitchen knife with a broad, straight-edged blade and a rounded tip, designed for general-purpose food preparation. The blade is matte and appears to be made of stainless steel, seamlessly transitioning into a contoured handle. The handle is ergonomically shaped, slightly curved, and likely constructed from a durable polymer or composite material, providing a comfortable grip. There is a small hole at the end of the handle, possibly for hanging or storage. The knife lacks any visible guard or crossguard, emphasizing a streamlined, utilitarian design. The entire object is a uniform dark color, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features.
description: A modern kitchen knife with a broad, straight-edged blade and a contoured, dark handle, designed for efficient food preparation. The design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight-edged blade and the ergonomic handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the blade and the rounded, slightly tapered handle with a hole at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle shape seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the handle's curvature and the blade's thinness.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, polymer, ergonomic, hole at end
